title: what Manga is this
wikitext:
[]: what Manga is this?             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Thu Jun 18, 2009 4:18 pm hey everybody. i found this picture of a Manga of NGE on Amazon.de. unfortunatly they had a FAIL and posted the pic as a cover for NGE 8: Mother, everyone who knows the mangas will now this isn't correct. but know to the question, from wich manga is this cover? can anyone please tell? thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Jun 18, 2009 6:16 pm It was a placeholder amazon never bothered to replace. The artwork itself was used in the previous Vol. 7 (not as front cover, but as extra within). When Vol. 8 was announced, they didn't have the final cover yet and they couldn't just use one of the old ones, so this was probably the next best thing for them.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Jun 18, 2009 7:05 pm It looks like a alternate cover for vol. 5.
